task: US-002: Create conversations table migration and Supabase types

1_conversations_table_schema.details: Migration creates conversations table with id (UUID PK), title (TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'New Chat'), last_message_preview (TEXT nullable), created_at (TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()), updated_at (TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW())

2_index_exists.details: Index idx_conversations_updated created on conversations(updated_at DESC)

3_enum_types_created.details: message_role ENUM ('user', 'agent', 'system') and message_type ENUM ('text', 'slash_command', 'result_card', 'progress', 'error') created

4_typescript_types.details: lib/types/conversations.ts exports Conversation, ConversationInsert, and ConversationUpdate interfaces with correct field types. TypeScript compilation passed with zero errors.

5_migration_filename.details: Migration file follows pattern: 20260301214652_create_conversations.sql (14-digit timestamp prefix)
